data.title: Tractor Supply expands AI, ecommerce, and delivery network
data.description: The retailer said it will continue investing in technology, ecommerce capabilities, delivery infrastructure and newer initiatives such as direct sales and pet and animal prescriptions.

data.title: Avnet deepens digital and AI investment as electronics demand rebounds
data.description: The company said rising digital engagement is also generating richer data about customer behavior, which feeds back into its AI models to refine forecasting, pricing, and customer support.

data.title: ACH growth signals quiet backbone of B2B ecommerce as businesses go digital
data.description: B2B ACH payments increased 10% year over year to about 8.1 billion transactions. Meanwhile, Same Day ACH — increasingly used for time-sensitive supplier, distributor and health care payments — grew 16.7% in volume and 21.4% in value.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Who's benefiting from a wave of online resale growth
data.description: The RealReal, Phia and Ikea all have stakes as online shopper interest grows in secondhand alternatives.

data.title: PVH Corp. to implement OpenAI tech into internal workflows
data.description: The collaboration sees PVH using OpenAI to "co-create custom AI capabilities" that the companies say will embed PVH's data into product design, demand planning, inventory optimization and consumer engagement.
